text:
If your ICP is "SaaS and Tech founders looking for ghostwriters/content marketers".

Use these high-intent keywords in your Linkedin posts consistently & strategically.

You should get an inbound gig in 2 months or at least DMs full of prospects:

SaaS Growth
Startup Growth
